title: hackelia microcarpa
intro: Hackelia microcarpa, also known as smallflower beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hackelia microcarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
